violations.text: Establishment is lacking an allergen statement. Establishment must post a visible allergen statement at points of ordering (menus, signage). PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

Bartender was observed touching ready to eat food (limes) with bare hands. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

A paper towel and soap dispenser was observed installed above the prep sink. A sink used for food preparation or utensil washing, or a service sink may not be provided with the handwashing aids. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

Raw animal foods (egg whites, shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (limes) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

An employee was observed touching raw animal foods (fish) and then touching ready-to-eat foods (cheese) without changing gloves. Cheese was voluntarily disposed of at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with brown biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

Birria sauce which was prepared on site, date marked 9/5 was observed held beyond the 7 days. Food items exceeding the 7 days (except time product is held frozen) shall be discarded. Food items were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

Ceviche is served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. At the time of inspection, cooked pork was observed stored in sealed plastic bags at 59°F. Per interview with the PIC, pork was prepared less than one hour prior. PIC removed pork from sealed bags and placed in shallow containers at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

At the time of inspection, ROP tuna was thawing with package intact. Reduced oxygen packaging fish that bears a label indicating that it is to be kept frozen until time of use shall be removed from the reduced oxygen environment. Temperature was observed at 37 degrees Fahrenheit, PIC took tuna out of package at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

Knives at the bar were observed stored on an unclean surface (in between refrigeration units) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

The condensate from the walk-in cooler is draining into the hand washing sink in the kitchen. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

The wall in the ware washing area had a visible buildup of black residue. Physical facilities must be cleaned as often as necessary to maintain cleanliness and prevent contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. PIC stated new menus will be printed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024

The ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024
The facility is lacking a 3-bay sink at the bar. 3-bay to be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024
